description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has three jobs: linux, macos, and wasm. The linux job runs on an ubuntu-latest container with a matrix of debian and ubuntu targets, installing dependencies and running make commands. The macos job runs on a macos matrix, installing dependencies and running make commands. The wasm job runs on ubuntu-24.04, setting up an Emscripten environment and running make commands.
